topic: Call of Duty new season review

turns.content: have you seen the new cod season yet they just dropped it last week
I'm aware of the new season dropping! What are your first impressions so far -- are you liking the new content?
its mid bro like the new maps are ok I guess but theres only 3 of em and one is just a remake from like 5 years ago which is lazy as hell

Only 3 maps with one being a remake is pretty underwhelming for a new season. Remakes can be cool for nostalgia, but when it's taking the place of original content it just feels like filler. Which map did they remake?

they brought back terminal which like ok cool I liked terminal back in the day but weve played that map a million times already give us somethin new you know. the other two are decent tho theres a rooftop one in tokyo thats kinda sick for snipin

Terminal is a classic but yeah, they've recycled it so many times at this point. The Tokyo rooftop map sounds cool though -- rooftop maps with good sightlines always play well for long-range fights. How's the new battle pass looking?

battle pass is whatever bro its the same formula as always like 100 tiers of mostly garbage with a few cool skins buried in there. theres a wicked sick operator skin at tier 95 but like im not grindin that hard for one skin

They really do bury the good stuff at the end every time. It's designed to keep you grinding, but when 90% of the rewards are filler -- stickers, calling cards, weapon charms -- it's hard to stay motivated. Did they add any new weapons at least?
yeah theres a new smg thats actually kinda broken rn everyone is runnin it in multiplayer. the ttk on it is stupid fast like if you see someone first they just die theres no counterplay
That's classic new-season balancing -- they always drop at least one overpowered weapon to get people to grind for it, then nerf it in a few weeks. Are you running it too or holding out on principle?
bro im absolutely runnin it lol im not about to get melted by it every game and not use it myself thats just dumb. if its in the game its fair game thats my mentality

Ha, can't argue with that logic. If everyone else is using it, you're just putting yourself at a disadvantage by not picking it up. Might as well enjoy it before the inevitable nerf patch. How's your KD looking with it?
dude ive been droppin like 30 kill games with it its insane. me and my boys have been runnin hardpoint and were just farmin kids its honestly not even fair

Hardpoint with a full squad running the meta weapon is basically a cheat code. Enjoy the power trip while it lasts -- those are the fun moments in CoD, running lobbies with your boys before they patch it all out.
facts bro its the little things in life lol alright im about to hop on actually thanks for chattin about it
Have fun man, go drop another 30 bomb before that nerf hits. Enjoy the new season.
